ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student (M/F) */,
  "age_band" TEXT /* Age band of the student */,
  "imd_band" TEXT /* Income deprivation band of the student */,
  "num_of_prev_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of previous attempts at courses */,
  "highest_education" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the student */,
  "disability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student has a disability */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits awarded for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses or requirements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the enrolled course */,
  "studied_credits" INTEGER /* Credits studied for the course */,
  "date_unregistration" INTEGER /* Date of unregistration, if applicable */,
  "final_result" TEXT /* Final result of the course */,
  "attendance" REAL /* Attendance percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_code FOREIGN KEY ("course_code") REFERENCES courses ("course_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "withdrawals" (
  "withdrawal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each withdrawal record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related enrollment */,
  "withdrawal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for withdrawal */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date of withdrawal */,
  "institution_response" TEXT /* Response or support offered by the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("withdrawal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_withdrawals_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic category */,
  "category" TEXT /* Name of the demographic category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic category */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "equivalence" TEXT /* Equivalent qualifications or certifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disabilities" (
  "disability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disability */,
  "disability_type" TEXT /* Type of disability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disability */,
  "support_provided" TEXT /* Support services provided by the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attempt record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student attempting the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course attempted */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* Attempt number (1st, 2nd, etc.) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the attempt */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback or comments from instructors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attempts_course_code FOREIGN KEY ("course_code") REFERENCES courses ("course_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attempts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment associated with the result */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade achieved in the course */,
  "grade_scale" TEXT /* Grade scale used (e.g., A-F, Pass/Fail) */,
  "evaluation" TEXT /* Detailed evaluation of student performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses_offered" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course offered */,
  "term" TEXT /* Academic term during which the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the course offering */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of enrollments allowed */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_offered_term FOREIGN KEY ("term") REFERENCES terms ("term_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_offered_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_offered_course_code FOREIGN KEY ("course_code") REFERENCES courses ("course_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester (e.g., first, second) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course assessed */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., quiz, exam, project) */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment in the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_course_code FOREIGN KEY ("course_code") REFERENCES courses ("course_code")
)
